Bucket.Tip: Do you have what it takes to defeat Oryx?
Are you ready to face the mysteries of the Realm?
This is Oryx's territory!
Discover exclusive blueprints in the shop!
Return to the Nexus anytime (Default: R)!
Turn seasonal into regular at the Nexus NPC!
Level your account via enemies, dungeons, and death. Rewards await!
Want a certain dungeon? Get the key from the shop!
Open the party finder (Default: L) and play with your friends!
Forge powerful gear at the Blacksmith!
Want a new look? Change yours in the Wardrobe!
Seasonal characters reset each season, items go to the spoils chest!
Use the vault chest to save items from death!
Add modifiers to gear to make them more powerful!
Customize your character's look with different dyes and cloths!
Equip emotes in the Vault and express yourself!
Enhance your profile with titles next to your name!
Get Marks from dungeon bosses! Use them at the Forge or Tinkerer!
Check the potion rack to see where you can obtain each potion
Type /g or /guild to chat with your guildmates!
Complete Tinkerer quests to earn rewards!
Get Marks from dungeon bosses! Use them at the Forge or Tinkerer!
Want a certain dungeon? Get the key from the shop!
Add a pet to help in battle!
Feed your pet in the Yard to boost its power!
Pets survive death, so upgrade and style them as you like!
Fuse your pets to create a new one!
Defeat enemies to gain realm score!
Click the map Beacons to teleport across the Realm!
Get dust from enemies and dungeons, use it to power up gear!
Each biome has exclusive gear, can you collect it all?
Enemies may drop dungeon portals with unique rewards!
Untiered Items drop in certain dungeons and events!
Call allies by Ctrl + Clicking the dungeon portal!
Speed, Dexterity, and Wisdom pots can drop in Shipwreck Cove!
Dexterity, Vitality, and Wisdom pots can drop in Haunted Hallows!
Attack, Defense, and Wisdom pots can drop in Dead Church!
Attack, Defense, and Speed pots can drop in Abandoned City!
Speed, Vitality, and Wisdom pots can drop in Coral Reefs!
Mana pots can drop in Runic Tundra!
Life pots can drop in Sanguine Forest!
Mana pots can drop in the Carboniferous!
Life pots can drop in Floral Escape!
Mana pots can drop in Deep Sea Abyss!
Roads lead to beacons. Beacons lead to new biomes...
Defeat the Guardian to free its Beacon!
Darker beacons mean harder nearby enemies!
Bosses grant more Realm Score!
The more you fight in a biome, the higher the chance of an Encounter!
Active beacons periodically heal nearby players
The Doom Bow's power lies in the Undead Lair
The Dirk of Cronus awaits those who slay the Cube God
Many enemies in the Realm serve in Oryx's Legion
The Sprite World is a primordial plane inexplicably linked to the Realm
The Undead Lair holds the souls of fallen warriors who served Oryx
The Forbidden Jungle's traditions may date back to the Primal Era
Beacon Guardians have a higher chance to drop biome UTs!
Type /tell for private chat!
Click a player on the map to teleport!
Use the mouse wheel to zoom the minimap!
Death gives fame. Spend it in the shop!
Get potions to boost your stats!
Complete missions, earn Battle Pass XP, and unlock rewards!
Seasonal characters turn regular after the season!
Careful! You lose all carried items on death!
The rarer the item, the more enchantments it gets!
Customize your experience in the options menu!
Defeat enemies to earn loot!
You must have 10 stars to use keys!
Keys unlock instant dungeon access!
Character slots let you have extra characters!
Become stronger by maxing your stats!
Unlock new classes and try various playstyles!
Maxed characters can earn permanent stat boosts in certain dungeons!
Crucible mode challenges you with new rules!
Equip 2 Set Tier pieces for first bonus, full set transforms you!
The higher the tier, the better the gear!
Upgrade keys with Left Ctrl + Left Click!
Need a speed boost? Try a Snake Eye Ring!
Every Rogue needs the Cloak of the Planewalker
True swordsmen seek the Demon Blade
The Shield of Ogmur drops enemy defense to 0!
No katana strikes as far as the unbeatable Ray Katana!
Visit the Realm Eye in the Cursed Library to learn more!
Dreadstump is the king of all pirates!
Fine clothes are made from Arachna's silk
Megamoths are fierce yet endangered creatures that thrive near druidic energies
Warrior Bees have battled for freedom since the Legion coveted their honey
Using divine powers, the Commander-Lord Carosburg once ruled the whole world
Something slumbers deep beneath the surface of the Realm
The Divine Beasts were the heralds of approaching disaster
What burden must Esben bear to keep, far away from prying eyes?
To get by, Craig's been taking side gigs, like snowball mazes
Guill seeks to reignite the spirit of guild adventurers
The Tinkerer wants to retire, someone must take his place
The Legion Intelligence is always watching

Take an additional damage equal to 1.25% of your current Health from every hit.
Take an additional damage equal to 2.5% of your current Health from every hit.
Take an additional damage equal to 3.75% of your current Health from every hit.
Take an additional damage equal to 5% of your current Health from every hit.
Players have 10% more Dex but 5% Less Att
Players have 17.5% more Dex but 10% Less Att
Players have 25% more Dex but 15% Less Att
Players have 33% more Dex but 20% Less Att
Player Mana recovery is reduced by 15%
Player Mana recovery is reduced by 20%
Player Mana recovery is reduced by 25%
Player Mana recovery is reduced by 30%
Player Mana recovery is increased by 15%
Player Mana recovery is increased by 20%
Player Mana recovery is increased by 25%
Player Mana recovery is increased by 30%
Minions have 10% more DEF and 5% More HP
Minions have 20% more DEF and 10% More HP
Minions have 30% more DEF and 15% More HP
Minions have 40% more DEF and 20% More HP
Bosses have 10% more DEF and 5% More HP
Bosses have 20% more DEF and 10% More HP
Bosses have 30% more DEF and 15% More HP
Bosses have 40% more DEF and 20% More HP
Enemies have a 10% chance to split into multiple spiders that drop ichors on death
Enemies have a 15% chance to split into multiple spiders that drop ichors on death.
After completion Oryx's Court dungeons will spawn
Dimitus will appear after the Boss is defeated
Prismimic will appear after the Boss is defeated
An unknown foe will appear after the Boss is defeated
Enemies can drop Defense Orbs on death.
Enemies can drop Damaging Orbs on death.
Enemies can drop Frenzy Orbs on death.
Enemies can drop Heroic Orbs on death.
Enemies have a 15% chance to split into multiple snakes that drop divine oil on death.
A portal to an alien dungeon will appear when the boss is defeated.
Battle Pirate Queen Ramm after the final boss of the dungeon.
Battle Izel the Grand Shaman after the final boss of the dungeon.
Battle Nefret the Pharaoh after the final boss of the dungeon.
Battle Black Blade Ozuchi after the final boss of the dungeon.
Boss enemies will always drop a Tincture or Effusion.
Boss enemies will drop additional restorative consumables
Players have 50% more Dex but 25% less Att
Players have 25% more Max HP but 50% less Defense
Players have 50% more Max MP but 50% less Mana Recovery.
25% increased XP, Loot, and Dust Gain
Boss drops a Mystery Stat Potion
Boss stat potion drops are Guaranteed
50% chance for the boss to drop a portal to the same dungeon
Complete the dungeon for an extra exaltation
Boss drops Agent of Oryx Shards
Boss enemies will drop player and pet skins at a doubled rate
Boss enemies will drop player and pet skins at a tripled rate
Triples your chance of boss dropping an iconic reward
Quadruples your chance of boss dropping an iconic reward
A Key Fairy will spawn after defeating the boss dropping a random key and Enchantment Dust.
The boss drops a token to obtain a Mystery Skin for up to 5 players
Treasure rooms are revealed if they exist
Treasure rooms are revealed if they exist. Gear items in them have extra 25% droprate
Additional 5% chance for each room to contain the Spectral Sentry
Additional 10% chance for each room to contain the Spectral Sentry
Additional 15% chance for each room to contain the Spectral Sentry
Thessal has a 25% chance of becoming wounded upon defeat
Thessal has a 50% chance of becoming wounded upon defeat
Thessal has a 75% chance of becoming wounded upon defeat
All Temple Lanterns are already lit.
Umi is guaranteed to guide players to fish after the dance.
Dungeon turrets are disabled while they undergo maintenance.
Calamity crab is replaced with multiple smaller crabs
Calamity crab is replaced with multiple smaller crabs
The castle starts with one Magi Generator active
All dragons drop loot as if they were the final dragon fought.
Most enemies before the midpoint of the dungeon are buffed.\n\nBoss enemies drop 45% more loot.
Enemy waves automatically progress after some time has passed.
A portal to the Oryxmania Rumble will appear after the boss is defeated.
A loot-bearing bunny alien will appear when the boss is defeated.
Enemy attacks apply momentary invulnerability, but life and magic healing are reduced by 30%.
Enemy attacks apply momentary invulnerability, but life and magic healing are reduced by 45%.
Enemy attacks apply momentary invulnerability, but life and magic healing are reduced by 60%.
Boss and Minions have 40% less HP and deal 30% less damage
60% chance to battle Inspector Stromwell in his Rift after the final boss of the dungeon.
Hone your skills against The Bridge Sentinel!
Hone your skills against The Twilight Archmage!
Hone your skills against The Forgotten King!
Boss has a 25% chance of dropping a portal to The Shatters.

Misc.Protip: Stay near the beach at first. Harder monsters live inland.
Other players can not hurt you, but they can help!
If you are with another player, you both earn full XP for each kill
Hit [O] to see all the keys and options
Escape to the Nexus by clicking the temple button
You earn fame when you die. Spend it in the Nexus!
Activate your special ability with either shift-click or a hotkey
Shift-Click or Double-Click a potion to drink it
Double-Click items in your inventory to use/equip them
Use the /tell command to talk to other players anywhere in the game
Drag an item onto the world to drop it
Zoom the minimap with the mouse wheel
Click a yellow or green minimap dot to teleport to another player
Each inventory slot has a hotkey -- mouseover to see it
You can drink potions even if they are still on the ground
Rerun the tutorial by typing "/tutorial" in chat
